reviews.comment:
La habitación esta bien para dormir y listo. Es calentita, la cama está bien y la ducha normal. El desayuno es en la ypf full, no tiene restorán como algunos ACA, asi que la cena (si no te queres mover de ahi) es hamburguesas y alguno otra opcion similar. El servicio del personal está muy bien. Cada habitación tiene su cochera.

(Translated by Google)
The room is fine for sleeping, that's all. It's warm, the bed is comfortable, and the shower is standard. Breakfast is at the YPF Full station; there's no restaurant like some ACA hotels, so dinner (if you don't want to leave the hotel) is usually hamburgers or similar options. The staff is very helpful. Each room has its own parking space.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ1d1BEZjV3RRAB
